summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SAKSAE SaaS B2B redesign with Attio-style design. Backend APIs performing excellently (100% success rate). Frontend components, user flows, and design elements all functioning correctly with no critical issues found.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Admin login with JWT cookies and brute force protection
User registration and login flows with proper validation
Lead creation API with SendGrid mocking
ROI calculation API
Contact form API
Newsletter subscription API with duplicate handling
Landing page loads with Attio-style design
Header with logo, navigation, language switcher FR/EN
Hero section with headline and subheadline
Platform section [01] with 16 module cards
Onboarding section [02] with 4 AI data import features
AI section [03] with 4 action feed cards and stats
Testimonial section with fade effect quote
Pricing section [04] with Starter €29 and Pro €79 plans
CTA final section with call-to-action
Footer with links
Dotted grid background pattern
Numbered sections [01][02][03][04]
Login page authentication flow
Register page user creation flow
Mobile responsiveness and mobile menu
Language switcher functionality on desktop and mobile
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (23/23 features working)
